jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Lupin
jsonLd.description:
Lupin has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lupin:
Lupin is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
